purpose: prevent loss of control-room progress between chats
rule: after every important control-room layer or before a new chat, archive state and push to GitHub branch before continuing
required_sync_steps: write archive json when route changes or chat ends
git add storage drafts rules approval market images metadata
git commit with layer name and date
verify via GitHub fetch/search before continuing
safe_default_branch_strategy: work on control-room-sync branch first, merge only after explicit approval
